headline: Meta Platforms (META) Partners with Best Buy to Launch Meta Lab Across 50 Stores
summary: Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ:META) is a widely held stock by hedge funds and is one of the best stocks to buy now for the next 3 months. Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ:META) is transitioning towards subscription models to support its AI investments. The company is introducing a range of subscriptions for its social media Apps, with […]

headline: Best Buy: Rating Downgrade As I Await More Evidence That Earnings Growth Can Accelerate
summary: Best Buy is downgraded to Hold after Q1 comps and margin gains; Marketplace/Ads help, but big-ticket demand is weak. Click for my latest analysis of BBY stock.
